implemented_capability.boundary: Tau owns the SciLLM chat/VLM transport; pdf_oxide supplies only deterministic review_request.json evidence.

test_proof.command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_scillm_chat_review.py tests/test_coding_worker_adapters.py -k "scillm_chat_review or scillm_worker_launch"
test_proof.what_it_proves: CLI/file-contract wiring, request forwarding to a fake OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint, image_url payload preservation, response parsing, response validation, auth fail-closed behavior, and preservation of existing scillm-worker-launch OpenCode route behavior.
test_proof.what_it_does_not_prove: Semantic model review quality or live SciLLM availability.

dry_run_page41_proof.command: uv run tau scillm-chat-review --request /tmp/pdf_oxide_integrate_gs001_20260721/artifacts/pdf_lab/live_second_pass_page41_tau_prep_20260721/page_case_0001_p0041/review_request.json --out /tmp/tau-issue122-page41-dry-run/receipt.json --response-out /tmp/tau-issue122-page41-dry-run/review_response.json --scillm-base-url http://127.0.0.1:4001 --caller-skill pdf-lab --request-timeout-s 120
dry_run_page41_proof.what_it_proves: The real pdf_oxide page41 review_request.json is accepted by the Tau command without executing HTTP.

live_page41_proof.command: uv run tau scillm-chat-review --request /tmp/pdf_oxide_integrate_gs001_20260721/artifacts/pdf_lab/live_second_pass_page41_tau_prep_20260721/page_case_0001_p0041/review_request.json --out /tmp/tau-issue122-page41-live-20260721T1422/receipt.json --response-out /tmp/tau-issue122-page41-live-20260721T1422/review_response.json --scillm-base-url http://127.0.0.1:4001 --caller-skill pdf-lab --apply --request-timeout-s 120
live_page41_proof.what_it_proves: Tau can consume the real pdf_oxide page41 review_request.json, call local SciLLM /v1/chat/completions with image_url parts, parse schema JSON, and write a provider-live receipt plus review_response.json under 120 seconds.

remaining_pdf_oxide_step: Copy the Tau live receipt and review_response into the pdf_oxide page41 case, run pdf_oxide review/terminal validation, then commit and push the page41 reviewed-clean evidence.
